zh.lifeSummary: 當Christian Chichley於1433年出生在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾坎布利其時，她的父親John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London21歲，母親Margery Knollys57歲。她和John Hervey至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1499年4月2日在英國可瓦爾享年66歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christian Chichley于1433年出生在英国英格兰坎布利其爾坎布利其时，她的父亲John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London21岁，母亲Margery Knollys57岁。她和John Hervey至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1499年4月2日在英国可瓦爾享年66岁。

nameMeanings.name: Christian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

variants.name: Christianne
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Christian Chichley was born in 1433, in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London, was 21 and her mother, Margery Knollys, was 57. She had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with John Hervey. She died on 2 April 1499, in Cornwall, England, at the age of 66.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christian Chichley est née en 1433, à Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Margery Knollys, avait 57 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec John Hervey. Elle est décédée le 2 avril 1499, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christian Chichley 1433 in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London 21 und ihre Mutter Margery Knollys 57. Sie hatte mit John Hervey mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 2. April 1499 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Cornwall, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christian Chichley è nata il nel 1433 nel Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Margery Knollys, aveva 57 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con John Hervey. Morì il 2 aprile 1499, nel Cornwall, England, all'età di 66 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Christian Chichleyが1433年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアカンブリッジで生まれた時，父John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of Londonは21歳，母Margery Knollysは57歳であった。彼女はJohn Herveyとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1499年4月2日にイギリスコルンワルで66歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Christian Chichley(이)가 1433년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margery Knollys(은)는 57세였다. 그녀는 John Hervey(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1499년 4월 2일 영국 코른월에서 66세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christian Chichley nasceu em 1433, em Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Margery Knollys, tinha 57 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com John Hervey. Ela faleceu em 2 de abril de 1499, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, com 66 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christian Chichley родилась в 1433 г. в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Margery Knollys, 57. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от John Hervey. Она умерла 2 апреля 1499 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия в возрасте 66 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christian Chichley nació en 1433, en Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Chicheley Lord Chamberlain of the City of London, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Margery Knollys, tenía 57 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con John Hervey. Murió el 2 de abril de 1499, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años.
